title: Rotten metal
description: Makes copper tools deteriorate via durability, you can now watch your orange sword rust and wither away!
body:
![line up of the rusted swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81f95791f3bafd135cfa1a1a6a2d854c71be089.png)
Copper tools are here and they are cool but no oxidization? Keep frogeting your durability? Then you need these rotten tools! Watch a pristen copper sword crumble to a pile of cyan dust. This pack doesn't have compadablity with other mods that add more copper tools this might change. (if i get time)
![cool bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ff4caa46d4a9b2e4b4169ad8e3de93d43d0fe93.png)
